actions._comment_step: OPTIONAL — omit this block if no DALL-E synthesis was used
actions.description: Synthetic seed image created by combining a style reference and a structural reference image using DALL-E image generation.

actions._comment_step: STEP 1 — seed image ingested as primary source for Marble
actions.description: Seed painting (primary source or DALL-E synthesis) placed as input to Marble panorama generation.

actions._comment_step: STEP 2 — initial panorama generated from seed
actions.description: Initial equirectangular panorama generated from seed image by Marble.

actions._comment_step: STEP 3 — panorama edited via text prompt, informed by a reference source
actions.description: Panorama edited using a text prompt informed by a reference document (e.g. camp layout map).

ingredients.dc:title: {{panorama_ref_title}}
ingredients.description: Reference source consulted when composing the panorama edit prompt (e.g. Manzanar camp map).

actions._comment_step: STEP 4 — final panorama used to seed 3-D world generation
actions.description: Initial 3-D world model generated from the final edited panorama.

actions._comment_step: STEP 5 — world expanded / edited via text prompt, informed by a testimonial or archival source
actions.description: 3-D world expanded or modified using a text prompt informed by an archival source (e.g. survivor testimony).

ingredients.dc:title: {{world_ref_title}}
ingredients.description: Archival source consulted when composing the world edit prompt (e.g. survivor quote / testimonial).

actions.description: Final 3-D world model exported and published with full provenance manifest.

_template_variables._note: All {{variables}} below must be resolved against AA attributes before injection.
_template_variables.file_name: AA attr: file_name on the final world model CID
_template_variables.description: AA attr: description — human-readable summary of the scene
_template_variables.author: AA attr: author — creator / class team name
_template_variables.project_url: AA attr: project_url — link to published webapp (optional)
_template_variables.seed_image_cid: CID of the seed PNG (original painting OR DALL-E synthesis)
_template_variables.dalle_prompt: (optional) AA attr: dalle_prompt on the synthetic seed CID
_template_variables.dalle_style_cid: (optional) CID of the style-reference image fed to DALL-E
_template_variables.dalle_structure_cid: (optional) CID of the structure-reference image fed to DALL-E
_template_variables.panorama_edit_prompt: AA attr: panorama_edit_prompt — text prompt used for panorama editing
_template_variables.panorama_ref_cid: CID of the reference document consulted for panorama edit (e.g. Manzanar map)
_template_variables.world_edit_prompt: AA attr: world_edit_prompt — text prompt used for world expansion/editing
_template_variables.world_ref_cid: CID of the archival source consulted for world edit (e.g. testimonial PDF/image)
_template_variables.time_created: AA attr: time_created VC (injected as Verifiable Credential)
_template_variables.registrations: AA attr: registrations VC (injected as Verifiable Credential)
